title: VideoARM: Agentic Reasoning over Hierarchical Memory for Long-Form Video Understanding (CVPR 2026)
summary: A hierarchical-memory and agentic-reasoning framework for long-form video understanding, accepted to CVPR 2026. The work focuses on information compression, memory organization, and multi-step reasoning for long-video QA.

title: Progressive Video Condensation with MLLM Agent for Long-form Video Understanding (ICME 2026)
summary: A study on progressive video condensation and MLLM-agent reasoning for long-form video understanding, accepted to ICME 2026.

title: Multiple Consistent 2D-3D Mappings for Robust Zero-Shot 3D Visual Grounding
summary: A robust zero-shot 3D visual grounding method based on multiple consistent 2D-3D mappings. Qianke Meng is the third author; the paper is available on arXiv.

title: Aesthetic Feature Modeling of Classical Jiangnan Gardens (National First Prize, China Graduate Mathematical Modeling Contest)
summary: A mathematical modeling study of aesthetic features and spatial layout patterns in classical Jiangnan gardens, awarded National First Prize in the China Graduate Mathematical Modeling Contest.

title: Undergraduate Thesis: Analysis and Practice of PDE Solving Methods Based on Fourier Neural Operator
summary: A study of deep-learning methods for solving partial differential equations with Fourier Neural Operators, exploring data-driven scientific computing.
